nodes.name: 灌丛
nodes.summary: 低矮木本植物占优势的陆地生境。

nodes.name: Noronha vireo
nodes.summary: Noronha vireo（Noronha vireo，学名 Vireo gracilirostris），在图谱中标记为易危（VU）物种，常见栖息地包括灌丛。

nodes.name: VU
nodes.summary: VU表示 IUCN 易危等级，当前关联694种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、索马里鸵鸟、大斑几维鸟等694种鸟类。

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: The Noronha vireo is found only on Fernando de Noronha island, which is about off the coast of northeastern Brazil. It is the only vireo on the island and is found "[in] any habitat". These include forest, shrublands, and gardens. Primary forest has been almost entirely eliminated on the island so secondary forest remains
